title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 07 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 07 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 07 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.92% today, the main contract closed 765. The traders' willingness toship is less.The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse. PBF at Shandong port dealt 786-792 yuan/mt,decrease 3-9 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 793-801 yuan/mt,increase 2-6 yuan/mt.
